notFound.title: Page Not Found
notFound.description: The page you are looking for does not exist or has been moved.

usersPage.title: User Management
usersPage.description: Manage users, roles, and permissions in one place

login.title: Welcome Back
login.description: Sign in to your account to continue
login.rateLimitMessage: Too many login attempts. Please try again in {countdown}.

block.title: Access Blocked
block.description: You don't have permission to access this resource.
block.reason: Your role has been removed or your permissions have been revoked. Please contact your administrator.
block.autoLogout: You will be automatically logged out in a few seconds.

roleInvalid.title: Access Revoked
roleInvalid.description: Your role has been removed or permissions have been revoked. You will be redirected.
